<!--
Thanks for contributing to Reado! Keep PRs focused — one change per PR is
easier to review and revert. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the conventions.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and what problem does it solve? Link issues with
"Closes #123". -->

Closes #

## How it was tested

<!-- The checks you ran locally. -->

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] Ran the app (`pnpm tauri dev`) and exercised the change by hand

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and the diff is as small as it can be
- [ ] Code, comments and docs are in English
- [ ] UI changes respect the calm, read-first design (no AI-slop tells)
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or the CLI contract changed

## Screenshots / recording

<!-- For any UI change, before/after images or a short clip. Delete if N/A. -->
